content:
**A Doll And Her Daughter**:

"As for my foster mother... I grew up at the school, cared for by all the teachers. But among them, I'm closest to Doll." -Ramona's Affinity II Voice Line

A collection of moments from Doll and Ramona's relationship throughout the years.

https://archiveofourown.org/works/63570475 
idk if this is the right place to post this but fuck it
